# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.AirAbsorptionUpdatedEventHandler delegate

Emitted when air-absorption lowpass cutoff changes.

```csharp
public delegate void AirAbsorptionUpdatedEventHandler(float cutoffHz);
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| cutoffHz | Only frequencies below this value can pass through to the listener. |
